name: Protein Folding and Chaperone Response
description: Chaperone-assisted protein folding: Hsp70 and chaperonins iteratively fold nascent chains, a heat-shock response replenishes chaperones under stress, and terminally misfolded proteins are routed to degradation.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Nascent polypeptide"]
    N2["Hsp70 binds hydrophobic"]
    N3["ATP-driven fold cycle"]
    N4{"Correctly folded?"}
    N5["Native functional protein"]
    N6["Chaperonin (TRiC/GroEL)"]
    N7["Proteostasis stress sensed"]
    N8["HSF1 induces chaperones"]
    N9["Terminally misfolded"]
    N10["Ubiquitin tag for disposal"]
    N11["Degraded / aggregates cleared"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 -->|yes| N5
    N4 -->|no| N6
    N6 -->|refold| N3
    N4 -->|stress| N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|more Hsp| N2
    N6 -->|fails| N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 --> N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Nascent polypeptide
nodeDetails.detail: Newly synthesized chain emerges from the ribosome

nodeDetails.label: ATP-driven fold cycle
nodeDetails.detail: ATP hydrolysis drives binding/release folding cycles

nodeDetails.label: Chaperonin (TRiC/GroEL)
nodeDetails.detail: Encapsulated folding in a chaperonin chamber

nodeDetails.label: Ubiquitin tag for disposal
nodeDetails.detail: Chaperone-linked E3s mark protein for degradation

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Molecular chaperones in protein folding and proteostasis

sources.title: Adapting proteostasis for disease intervention

sources.title: The unfolded protein response: from stress pathway to homeostatic regulation
